form.formComment: Resuming after 12 weeks off the scene. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 1.5 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Miss Out at Globe Derby Park over 2230m in a NR 42 to 47 on January 17 at $3.80. Nicely draw and expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resuming after 12 weeks off the scene. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 1.5 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Miss Out at Globe Derby Park over 2230m in a NR 42 to 47 on January 17 at $3.80. Nicely draw and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Last preparation only had 2 starts before going for a break. Returned to racing with a handy win a big 7 m win (Fr5) at this track (1:57.80) beating The Game in NR up to 40 GROUP on March 30 at $3.80 at the bell was leading 3.1. Fitter and expected to be competitive again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last preparation only had 2 starts before going for a break. Returned to racing with a handy win a big 7 m win (Fr5) at this track (1:57.80) beating The Game in NR up to 40 GROUP on March 30 at $3.80 at the bell was leading 3.1. Fitter and expected to be competitive again.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr4) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park was 3rd-4.8 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Well Well (2:16.60) in NR up to 39 on March 23 at $2. Before that, 9th (Sr1) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park beaten 22 m by Sweet Arpeggio (2:14.70) in NR 40 to 42 on March 11 at $2.10. Good signs last start and this looks a suitable contest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 6th (Fr4) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park was 3rd-4.8 at the bell, beaten 7 m by Well Well (2:16.60) in NR up to 39 on March 23 at $2. Before that, 9th (Sr1) over 1800m at Globe Derby Park beaten 22 m by Sweet Arpeggio (2:14.70) in NR 40 to 42 on March 11 at $2.10. Good signs last start and this looks a suitable contest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced when Just Mocha shifted up the track in the final straight.
Had difficulty finding a clear run over the final 400 m and never fully tested.

form.formComment: Last start hung in on scoring up, surrendered the lead and finished 8th (Fr1) over 1800m after showing early speed at Globe Derby Park, beaten 40 m by Nancestiger (2:11.80) in 6 LIFETIME WINS on April 4 at $15.10. Two runs back surrendered the lead and finished 3rd (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early pace at Port Pirie, at the bell was 3rd-4.4 beaten 17 m by Lincs Poor Boy (1:56.20) in NR 47 to 54 on March 31 at $23. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start hung in on scoring up, surrendered the lead and finished 8th (Fr1) over 1800m after showing early speed at Globe Derby Park, beaten 40 m by Nancestiger (2:11.80) in 6 LIFETIME WINS on April 4 at $15.10. Two runs back surrendered the lead and finished 3rd (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early pace at Port Pirie, at the bell was 3rd-4.4 beaten 17 m by Lincs Poor Boy (1:56.20) in NR 47 to 54 on March 31 at $23. Unlikely to threaten in this tougher assignment.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the concluding stages to eventually be beaten 31.0m.
Shifted out on the turn into the front straight near the 200m.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished a narrow second behind Don Capitano at Port Pirie over 1609m 6 LIFETIME WINS last start. Before that was beaten 3 metres third at Globe Derby Park over 1800m in NR 48 to 57 on March 21. Among the top chances on recent form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished a narrow second behind Don Capitano at Port Pirie over 1609m 6 LIFETIME WINS last start. Before that was beaten 3 metres third at Globe Derby Park over 1800m in NR 48 to 57 on March 21. Among the top chances on recent form.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr2) over 1800m after showing early speed at Globe Derby Park was 2nd-0.4 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Nancestiger (2:11.80) in 6 LIFETIME WINS on April 4 at $15.10. Before that, 5th (Sr1) over 2070m at this track was 6th-9.3 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Linxx (2:33.30) in NR 41 to 46 on March 30 at $3.50. Expected to be competitive again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 5th (Fr2) over 1800m after showing early speed at Globe Derby Park was 2nd-0.4 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Nancestiger (2:11.80) in 6 LIFETIME WINS on April 4 at $15.10. Before that, 5th (Sr1) over 2070m at this track was 6th-9.3 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Linxx (2:33.30) in NR 41 to 46 on March 30 at $3.50. Expected to be competitive again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had a tendency to over race when racing in a trailing position near the 1200m.
Raced roughly for a short distance shortly after the start was effected.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr5) over 2190m at Mildura, well beaten by Dallas Miki (2:39.30) in NR 51 to 55 on March 20 at $14. Two runs back won by 2 m after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Mildura (2:47.30) beating Thebucksonyou in NR up to 55 on August 29 at $4.40 at the bell was leading 2.1m on the pegs. Open to plenty of improvement.

form.trainerName: M J SCHRADER, B L SMITH

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tended to pace roughly at stages and tired to be beaten 174m.
